summary: Hardened refund.integration.test.ts with 8 tests: full refund, partial refund, 409 for already-refunded, over-refund 400, Stripe failure 502, audit log assertions, list refunds, and 404 for missing order. Added ERR_ORDER_ALREADY_REFUNDED (409) and ERR_REFUND_PROVIDER_FAILURE (502) to server.ts.
